commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Add global DistantGlintSettings which apply to the glint equation in real-time and can be copied to the existing distant glint XML. Settings include start and end falloff distance (for the falloff of the glint intensity with distance as it reduces to no glint), the falloff function (linear or smoothstep), rotation speed multiplier (for controlling the speed at which rotations sample the curves), and the max glint value.
Move distant glints toggle from the Debug menu to the distant glint editor.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed an issue where the closest approach info in the Target gauge UI can sometimes not match the closest approach info in the map view and target tracking window. (was not taking into account all potential encounters and excluding ones in the past).

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Eliminated allocation when iterating over Modules by interface.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: continue;
Fixed allocation when sorting StaticCelestial Instance Data by using a non-generic IComparable eliminating falling through to generic ArraySortrHelper which boxes.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added distance readouts to the Axis markers on the Target Tracker Window.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added view option to Target Tracking Window to set the zoom to bound the chaser and target vehicle positions.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added a handle to the particle emitters to help external sources keep track of when a particle finishes simulating and gets recycled back into the pool.

Reworked how particle emitters handle elapsed simulation time. This not only could result in inaccuracies over time, it was also resulting in some emitters that spawned over a period of time to be destroyed immediately, believing that their sim time had ended before they could spawn any particles.

Added ability to externally force an emitter to stop spawning. This means that the emitter will die naturally and let any existing particles act normally, however it will return itself back to the pool once all current particles have died without spawning any new ones.
Added early out to particle updaters. This is technically a minor optimization but mostly helps with debugging, avoiding any empty particle updaters when searching through active emitters.
Tanks now store the particle emitters handle instead of its direct initializationID.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed a poorly-conditioned collision acceleration structure that could result from modifying an existing vehicle.
Fixed inconsistency between Bepu and native bounding geometry.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added manual zoom option to Target Track Window. In auto mode (default) you can pan but you cannot change the zoom of the display panels. In manual mode you can zoom in and out / change the zoom mode.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Prevent RCS pulse and rate scales from becoming > 1 when sim speed is < 1.

commits.author: lghassen
lines: Use Universe.GetLastSimStep().DeltaTime in CloudRenderer when integrating changes since last frame instead of manually multiplying the frame deltaTime by the Universe simulationSpeed

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added moving particle emitters between vehicle instances when they split or merge.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Remove previous particle processing from worker threads as no longer needed.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Enable glints by default, as they are now ready. Move "Show distant glints" toggle from the debug editor to the graphics settings menu.
Add Inverse Square glint falloff function to simulate more realistic lighting falloff. The result wasn't good as the falloff happens too quickly, so smoothstep is still used as the default.
Rename "Lerp" glint falloff function to "Smoothstep".
Fix issue with start and end falloff values being buggy.

commits.author: Dan Southon
lines: Reduced re-calculating L and dotNL values for lighting

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Temporarily replaced incremental collider tree refits with full rebuilds since we were getting ill-conditioned geometry as the center of mass shifted.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added initial implementation for particles to be optionally relative to their emitters.
Ice particles now spawn on the exterior of a vehicle and slowly build up. When the vehicle moves the ice will get dislodged and begin to fall off.
Added a new updater for particles attached to vehicles. This allows for particles to transition from attached to dettached controlled by values external to the compute shader.
Temporarily disabled volumetric ice particles.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Applied vehicle attachment logic to the insulation debris particles. This means that the insulation debris now spawns all at once when the vehicles particles reset such as on teleport. They then fall off when the vehicle hits a certain speed threshold. Currently the insulation meshes are not setup with any initial rotation so on spawn the meshes all face the same direction. It is heavily WIP.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Particles attached to a vehicle can now optionally fade in when they spawn instead of suddenly spawning in. This is enabled for ice to emulate ice building up on the exterior of the vehicle, however insulation debris doesn't as this is meant to be a rigid mesh attached to the side of the fuel tanks.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Properly implemented compound collider center of mass shifting this time.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed two causes of very poor performance in some scenarios where we would fail to fall back to cheap integration methods and/or recalculate expensive terrain quantities for inactive vehicles.

commits.author: Dan Southon
lines: Added dynamic object rotation for thumbnails when hovering a part in the VehicleEditor

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Cache body inertia type when generating the principal axes frame so we don't have to keep re-deriving it.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Particles attached to a vehicle now have variance added to their velocity when they dettach from the vehicle.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed error in incorrect classification of orbit type for Parabolic orbits.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Particle emitters can now stop particles from aging. This is needed for debris particles on the exterior of vehicles, insulation particles shouldn't fade out until they have actually fallen off the side of the vehicle.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed - Let's handle invalid orbital parameters in a nicer way by logging errors and not throwing exceptions. Especially when teleporting.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed tooltips for UI gauges appearing when hovering when another UI canvas is on top of them.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Particles spawned on the surface of a vehicle are now rotated relative to the surfaces normal. This fixes the insulation debris particles all spawning with the same orientation.
Improved the precomputed spawn transforms for particles attached to fuel tanks. Particles now spawn more distributed across the meshes surface.
Additional tweaks to the ice debris particle settings in XML.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Adjusted vehicle debris particles gravity strengths. This was previously set to 0 while initially setting up particles to be attached to the surface of a vehicle and not fall off.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added explicit gravity data to particle updaters. Previously this was getting packed into the emitters force data.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed an elder bug lurking since July 2025 where a vehicle which receives a new orbit AND a subsequent new state vector for that orbit on the same frame would have them applied in the wrong order, thus wiping out the state vector update and holding on to states from the past.
